user.title: Main Battery
user.description: Configure your main battery system. The power sensor is used to track house load consumption automatically.

backup.title: Backup Battery
backup.description: Do you have a backup battery that assists overnight (e.g., Powerwall, secondary inverter)?

backup_details.title: Backup Battery Details
backup_details.description: Configure your backup battery. It discharges at a fixed rate starting at the activation hour to assist the main battery overnight.

dump_loads.title: Dump Loads
dump_loads.description: Loads that run only when there is excess solar (e.g., water heater, pool pump). Currently configured: {count}. Choose an action to add, edit, or remove a load, or Continue to proceed.

dump_load_type.title: Dump Load — Entry Type
dump_load_type.description: How should this dump load's energy be tracked?

dump_load_manual.title: Dump Load — Manual
dump_load_manual.description: Estimate the load's average power and the daytime window during which it runs when there is excess solar.

dump_load_manual_advanced.title: Dump Load — Hourly Profile (kW)
dump_load_manual_advanced.description: Set the expected kW for each hour. Hours not running can be left at 0.

dump_load_sensor.title: Dump Load — Power Sensor
dump_load_sensor.description: Select a power sensor (W) for this load. The integration will track its energy automatically and build a 7-day rolling hourly profile.

solar_source.title: Solar Forecast
solar_source.description: Select your solar forecast integration. Entities will be discovered automatically. Choose 'Manual' to select entities individually.

solcast.title: Solar Forecast Entities (Manual)
solcast.description: Select your solar PV forecast sensors for each forecast day.

options.title: Forecast Options
options.description: Set forecast range, target SoC, and fallback consumption values. Fallback values are used until 7 days of real consumption data has been collected.

data.guard_threshold: Minimum kWh for averages to be valid

init.title: Sunrise SoC Forecast
init.description: Pick a section to edit. Your other settings are preserved.

backup.title: Backup Battery
backup.description: Do you have a backup battery that assists overnight?

dump_loads.title: Dump Loads
dump_loads.description: Loads that run only when there is excess solar. Currently configured: {count}. Choose an action to add, edit, or remove a load, or Continue to save and exit.

dump_load_type.title: Dump Load — Entry Type
dump_load_type.description: How should this dump load's energy be tracked?

dump_load_manual.title: Dump Load — Manual
dump_load_manual.description: Estimate the load's average power and the daytime window during which it runs when there is excess solar.

dump_load_manual_advanced.title: Dump Load — Hourly Profile (kW)
dump_load_manual_advanced.description: Set the expected kW for each hour. Hours not running can be left at 0.

dump_load_sensor.title: Dump Load — Power Sensor
dump_load_sensor.description: Select a power sensor (W) for this load. The integration will track its energy automatically and build a 7-day rolling hourly profile.

solar_source.title: Solar Forecast
solar_source.description: Select your solar forecast integration, or choose 'Manual' to select entities individually.

solcast.title: Solar Forecast Entities (Manual)
solcast.description: Select your solar PV forecast sensors.

forecast_options.title: Forecast Options
forecast_options.description: Set forecast range, target SoC, and fallback values.

data.guard_threshold: Minimum kWh for averages to be valid
